use_cases: Full-page background for landing pages and hero sections
Section dividers with subtle grid texture
Dark-themed website backgrounds with depth effect
ai_summary: A lightweight decorative background component featuring a radial gradient transitioning from blue to black, overlaid with an ultra-subtle white grid pattern at 2% opacity. Designed as a fixed-position backdrop for hero sections, landing pages, or full-page layouts requiring a dark, modern aesthetic with depth.
